arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Eintracht Frankfurt issue Omar Marmoush statement after 'verbal agreement'
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt confirm that Omar Marmoush is in talks with "another club" amid claims of a verbal agreement with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Napoli make verbal approach for Karim Adeyemi as Khvicha Kvaratskhelia replacement
arts.sum: With Khvicha Kvaratskhelia’s pending move to Paris Saint-Germain, Napoli have eyed Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi as a replacement. According to Patrick Berger, the Italian side have made a verbal approach…

arts.ttl: Details of Omar Marmoush’s Manchester City contract
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush (25) has likely played his last game for Eintracht Frankfurt. Per BILD, the Egyptian forward isn’t in the club’s squad to face Borussia Dortmund in the Bundesliga tonight…

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford’s Transfer Saga: Milan Out of the Race as Dortmund Move In
arts.sum: The transfer market is heating up, and the future of Marcus Rashford has become a focal point of speculation. The Manchester United forward has been linked with several clubs, but recent developments suggest that AC Milan may be stepping back from the race, allowing Borussia Dortmund to take the lead in pursuing the English international. The post Marcus Rashford’s Transfer Saga: Milan Out of the Race as Dortmund Move In appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga transfer updates: Eintracht Frankfurt settle on €3.5m for Jens Petter Hauge, Stuttgart prospect Jovan Milosevic receives new loan
arts.sum: As Bundesliga transfer January activity continues across the Bundesrepublik, Eintracht Frankfurt and VfB Stuttgart have confirmed transactions over the past 24 hours.

arts.ttl: Golf great Rory McIlroy enjoys Borussia Dortmund's Yellow Wall experience
arts.sum: Rory McIlroy made the most of his recent off-season relaxation by joining Borussia Dortmund fans for the Matchday 16 encounter against Bayer Leverkusen at the Signal Iduna Park. McIlroy found himself in the middle of the legendary Yellow Wall - the 25,000 capacity south stand at Dortmund that is known around the world for its incredible atmosphere.

arts.ttl: Dortmund join race for Rashford - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund join the race for Manchester United's Marcus Rashford, AC Milan could move for Joao Felix from Chelsea, Juventus want £67m for Andrea Cambiaso.
